zh.lifeSummary: 當Berthe de Montfort於1070年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯蒙特福吉利曼利時，她的父親Simon de Montfort45歲，母親Agnès d'Évereux25歲。她於1089年與Foulques IV le Réchin comte d'Anjou et de Tours在法國安喬結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1117年2月14日在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易豐特福勞爾吉利阿巴易享年47歲，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯艾頌布盧艾雷勒-a特爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Berthe de Montfort于1070年出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯蒙特福吉利曼利时，她的父亲Simon de Montfort45岁，母亲Agnès d'Évereux25岁。她于1089年与Foulques IV le Réchin comte d'Anjou et de Tours在法国安喬结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1117年2月14日在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易豐特福勞爾吉利阿巴易享年47岁，埋葬在法国i萊-德-福朗斯艾頌布盧艾雷勒-a特爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Monfort
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Monforte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmela, Carmine, Rocco, Rosaria, Sal.  Spanish Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Medardo.

Italian and Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Monforte, from Latin mons ‘mountain’ (genitive montis) + fortis ‘strong’, probably a reference to the strategic position of these locations.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Montfort  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Berthe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Berthe de Montfort was born in 1070, in Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, her father, Simon de Montfort, was 45 and her mother, Agnès d'Évereux, was 25. She married Foulques IV le Réchin comte d'Anjou et de Tours in 1089, in Anjou, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 14 February 1117, in Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 47, and was buried in Bruyères-le-Châtel, Essonne, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Berthe de Montfort est née en 1070, à Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, son père, Simon de Montfort, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Agnès d'Évereux, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Foulques IV le Réchin comte d'Anjou et de Tours en 1089, à Anjou, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 14 février 1117, à Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterrée à Bruyères-le-Châtel, Essonne, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Berthe de Montfort 1070 in Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Simon de Montfort 45 und ihre Mutter Agnès d'Évereux 25. Sie hat 1089 in Anjou, Frankreich Foulques IV le Réchin comte d'Anjou et de Tours geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 14. Februar 1117 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich und wurde in Bruyères-le-Châtel, Essonne, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Berthe de Montfort è nata il nel 1070 nel Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Simon de Montfort, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Agnès d'Évereux, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Foulques IV le Réchin comte d'Anjou et de Tours nel 1089, nel Anjou, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 14 febbraio 1117, nel Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolta a Bruyères-le-Châtel, Essonne, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Berthe de Montfortが1070年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスイベラインスモントフォート-ル'アマアウリーで生まれた時，父Simon de Montfortは45歳，母Agnès d'Évereuxは25歳であった。1089年にフランスアンジョウでFoulques IV le Réchin comte d'Anjou et de Toursと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1117年2月14日にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーフォンテvラウルト-ル'アッバイで47歳で死去し，フランスiレ-デ-フランスエソンブルイeレス-レ-チaテルにて埋葬された。

ko.Fontevraud-L'Abbaye,49140,Maine-et-Loire: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 폰테브라트-'압베이
ko.lifeSummary: Berthe de Montfort(이)가 1070년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 이벨라이네스 몽포트-'아모리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Simon de Montfort(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnès d'Évereux(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1089년 프랑스 앤조우에서 Foulques IV le Réchin comte d'Anjou et de Tours(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1117년 2월 14일 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 폰테브라트-'압베이에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 에손 브루이e레스-레-cha텔에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Berthe de Montfort nasceu em 1070, em Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Simon de Montfort, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Agnès d'Évereux, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Foulques IV le Réchin comte d'Anjou et de Tours em 1089, em Anjou, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 14 de fevereiro de 1117, em Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França, com 47 anos, e foi sepultada em Bruyères-le-Châtel, Essonne, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Berthe de Montfort родилась в 1070 г. в местности монтфорт-л'амаури, ивелаинесь, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Simon de Montfort было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnès d'Évereux, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Foulques IV le Réchin comte d'Anjou et de Tours в 1089 г. в местности анджоу, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 14 февраля 1117 г. в местности фонтевраулт-л'аббеи, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 47 лет и была похоронена в местности бруиeрес-ле-чaтел, эссонн, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Berthe de Montfort nació en 1070, en Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Simon de Montfort, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Agnès d'Évereux, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Foulques IV le Réchin comte d'Anjou et de Tours en 1089, en Anjou, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 14 de febrero de 1117, en Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultada en Bruyères-le-Châtel, Essonne, Île-de-France, Francia.
